title: narcissus algarbiensis
intro: Narcissus algarbiensis, also known as the Algarve daffodil, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Narcissus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Narcissus algarbiensis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever. Narcissus algarbiensis is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
